---
id: reload-roles
title: "Invalidate cached role/scope resolutions"
description: "FUNCTIONAL group scopes are DB-backed (DS T12, #712); this endpoint invalidates every cached ScopeResolver entry so the next request for any user re-resolves from auth.group_scopes immediately, ahead of the cache TTL."
sidebar_label: "Invalidate cached role/scope resolutions"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "post api-method"
info_path: reference/api/trms-api
custom_edit_url: null
---

import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";
import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";
import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";
import StatusCodes from "@theme/StatusCodes";
import OperationTabs from "@theme/OperationTabs";
import TabItem from "@theme/TabItem";
import Heading from "@theme/Heading";
import Translate from "@docusaurus/Translate";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Invalidate cached role/scope resolutions"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/api/v1/config/roles/reload"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



FUNCTIONAL group scopes are DB-backed (DS T12, #712); this endpoint invalidates every cached ScopeResolver entry so the next request for any user re-resolves from auth.group_scopes immediately, ahead of the cache TTL.

<ParamsDetails>
  
</ParamsDetails>

<RequestSchema
  {...require("./reload-roles.RequestSchema.json")}
>
  
</RequestSchema>

<StatusCodes
  {...require("./reload-roles.StatusCodes.json")}
>
  
</StatusCodes>
